fields.label: Max Response Tokens
fields.description: Maximum tokens the AI can use in a single response

fields.label: Enable Floating Chat Widget
fields.description: Show a floating AI chat button on every ERPNext page

fields.label: Enable Write Actions
fields.description: Allow the AI to create and update records. Enable only if you trust the prompts.

fields.label: Direct Mode (No Background Worker)
fields.description:
ON — response runs inline in the web request. Works without bench worker / Redis / socket.io. Recommended for development or small teams.
OFF — uses background queue + real-time streaming. Requires bench worker, Redis, and socket.io. Better for production with many concurrent users.

fields.label: Max Tool Calls per Message
fields.description: Caps AI reasoning steps per response to control API cost and latency

fields.label: Additional System Instructions
fields.description: Extra instructions appended to the default AI system prompt

fields.label: Custom API Documentation
fields.description:
Document your app's whitelisted methods here so the AI knows when and how to call them. Plain text or markdown. Example:

myapp.api.get_guard_roster(posto, date) — returns the duty roster for a given Posto de Vigilancia on a date
myapp.billing.get_monthly_revenue(month, year) — returns total billed revenue for the month
